subcodes.first_line: O young trees and plants, matchless and tender, that grow in the meadows of guidance! ...the Bab hath said: "Should a tiny ant desire in this day to be possessed of such power
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهالان بیهمال چمنستان هدایت و نورسیدگان اهل حقیقت هر چند حال تلامذه اید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @study; deepening, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
